data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes user decision-making time by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI with prioritized navigation to enhance decision speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements for quick access and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Large, clickable targets and minimal cursor movement.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations for familiar interface elements.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of design patterns found in major web applications.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits cognitive load by managing information presented at one time.
data.technical_spec: Chunking information and reducing clutter for cognitive ease.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Increases usability perception through attractive design.
data.technical_spec: Visually appealing and engaging layouts to improve user satisfaction.
